name: CIS Controls
description: CIS Critical Security Controls v8 - prioritized cyber defense best practices

requirements.category: CIS 1 - Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets
requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain an accurate, detailed, and up-to-date inventory of all enterprise assets.
requirements.expected_evidence: Asset inventory, CMDB records, discovery scan results
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy automated asset discovery and maintain a centralized asset inventory updated at least monthly.

requirements.category: CIS 2 - Inventory and Control of Software Assets
requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain a detailed inventory of all licensed software installed on enterprise assets.
requirements.expected_evidence: Software asset inventory, license compliance records
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement software asset management to track all installed applications and versions.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain a data management process to identify, classify, and document sensitive data.
requirements.expected_evidence: Data classification policy, data inventory, labeling procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Classify all data by sensitivity and implement handling requirements per classification level.

requirements.requirement_text: Encrypt sensitive data at rest on servers, applications, and databases.
requirements.expected_evidence: Encryption policy, encryption implementation for databases and storage
requirements.recommendation_text: Enable AES-256 encryption for all sensitive data at rest including databases, file systems, and backups.

requirements.requirement_text: Encrypt sensitive data in transit using approved cryptographic protocols.
requirements.expected_evidence: TLS configuration standards, certificate management
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce TLS 1.2+ on all data transmission channels.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain a secure configuration process for enterprise assets and software.
requirements.expected_evidence: Configuration baselines, hardening guides, compliance scan results
requirements.recommendation_text: Define and enforce secure configuration baselines based on CIS Benchmarks for all systems.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain an inventory of all accounts managed in the organization.
requirements.expected_evidence: Account inventory, IAM system records
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain centralized inventory of all user and service accounts with ownership and purpose.

requirements.requirement_text: Use unique passwords for all enterprise assets and rotate passwords periodically.
requirements.expected_evidence: Password policy, password manager deployment
requirements.recommendation_text: Enforce unique passwords and deploy enterprise password management for all accounts.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and follow a process for granting access to enterprise assets based on least privilege.
requirements.expected_evidence: Access provisioning procedures, RBAC matrix
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement least-privilege access with formal provisioning and deprovisioning workflows.

requirements.requirement_text: Require multi-factor authentication for all externally-exposed enterprise applications.
requirements.expected_evidence: MFA deployment for external apps, authentication policy
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy MFA on all internet-facing applications and VPN access.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain a vulnerability management process.
requirements.expected_evidence: Vulnerability management policy, scan schedules, remediation tracking
requirements.recommendation_text: Run automated vulnerability scans at least weekly and track remediation to completion.

requirements.requirement_text: Perform automated vulnerability scans of enterprise assets at least monthly.
requirements.expected_evidence: Vulnerability scan reports, scanning tool configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy automated vulnerability scanning across all enterprise assets monthly at minimum.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain an audit log management process for enterprise assets.
requirements.expected_evidence: Logging policy, centralized log management, retention schedules
requirements.recommendation_text: Centralize logs from all critical systems with defined retention and review procedures.

requirements.requirement_text: Collect audit logs from enterprise assets and ensure logs are protected from tampering.
requirements.expected_evidence: Log collection architecture, log integrity controls
requirements.recommendation_text: Collect logs to a centralized SIEM with write-once storage and access controls.

requirements.category: CIS 9 - Email and Web Browser Protections
requirements.requirement_text: Ensure only fully supported browsers and email clients are allowed in the enterprise.
requirements.expected_evidence: Approved software list, browser/email security configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Maintain allowlist of supported browsers and email clients with security configurations enforced.

requirements.requirement_text: Deploy and maintain anti-malware software on all enterprise assets.
requirements.expected_evidence: EDR/antivirus deployment records, malware detection reports
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy EDR on all endpoints with real-time scanning and centralized management.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain a data recovery process with tested backups.
requirements.expected_evidence: Backup policy, backup schedules, restore test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Implement automated encrypted backups and test restoration quarterly.

requirements.requirement_text: Ensure network infrastructure is kept up-to-date with security patches.
requirements.expected_evidence: Network device patch records, firmware update procedures
requirements.recommendation_text: Patch network infrastructure firmware and software within defined SLAs.

requirements.requirement_text: Deploy network monitoring tools to identify and alert on malicious network activity.
requirements.expected_evidence: Network monitoring tools, IDS/NDR deployment, alert configuration
requirements.recommendation_text: Deploy network intrusion detection and monitor for anomalous traffic patterns.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain a security awareness program for all workforce members.
requirements.expected_evidence: Training program, completion records, phishing test results
requirements.recommendation_text: Deliver mandatory security awareness training annually with simulated phishing exercises.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain an inventory of service providers and assess their security posture.
requirements.expected_evidence: Vendor inventory, third-party risk assessments
requirements.recommendation_text: Inventory all service providers and conduct security assessments before engagement.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish secure coding practices and train developers in application security.
requirements.expected_evidence: Secure coding standards, developer training records, SAST integration
requirements.recommendation_text: Train developers on OWASP Top 10 and integrate SAST into the development pipeline.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain an incident response process with defined roles and procedures.
requirements.expected_evidence: Incident response plan, playbooks, tabletop exercise records
requirements.recommendation_text: Develop and test incident response plans with defined roles, escalation, and communication procedures.

requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain a penetration testing program based on risk.
requirements.expected_evidence: Penetration test reports, testing schedule, remediation tracking
requirements.recommendation_text: Conduct annual penetration tests with remediation tracking for all findings.
